name: rich-tooltip
title: Rich Tooltip
author: Parable
description: A Vercel-style rich tooltip that springs open from its trigger with a scale + fade and a real arrow, holding arbitrary ReactNode content rather than a bare string. Placement is computed by hand (no positioning lib) — measuring trigger and tooltip to auto-flip top⇄bottom / left⇄right on viewport overflow and clamp the cross axis — and it renders through a portal to document.body so ancestor overflow never clips it. Hover and focus open it with small delays, moving into the tooltip keeps it open, and Escape closes; under prefers-reduced-motion the show/hide is instant with no scale.
